summary:

it’s his birthday, do i really need to summarise? sigjhhhhhhh. ok so like you threw him a surprise party thinking that you forgot his birthday so he was a bit down and cheered up with campers as Piper and Jason kept him away from his cabin while you, Grover, Annabeth and Leo were putting up blue decorations for his birthday. he’s 18!

author’s message:

giys i lowkey forgot Percy’s borthday was on the 18th. SO HAPPY BIRTHDAY PERCY MY MAN MY MAN MY MANN 🤗🤗
